description: Fix the formatting of the engineering report '/home/ga/Documents/structural_analysis_draft.odt' to resolve spacing and page break issues. Remove all manual empty paragraphs used for vertical spacing. Update the 'Heading 1' and 'Heading 2' styles to ensure they stay with the following paragraph. Configure the 'Text Body' style to include widow and orphan control (at least 2 lines) and 0.10" (0.25cm) spacing below each paragraph. Save the corrected document as '/home/ga/Documents/structural_analysis_final.odt'.
